content.problemStatement: In this task, you will create a program to collect information about the user's dream car brand, model, and the year they would like to own it. This will help practice gathering input using `.split()` and converting the year using `int()`.
constraints: Brand and model are non‑empty strings without spaces, each up to 20 characters
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Each test case consists of two lines: the first line contains the car brand and model separated by a space (both are strings without spaces), and the second line contains an integer representing the desired year.
content.outputFormat: For each test case output a single line: You dream of owning a <car_brand> <car_model> in the year <dream_year>.

sampleTestCases.output:
You dream of owning a Tesla ModelX in the year 2030.
You dream of owning a Maruti 800 in the year 2001.
sampleTestCases.explanation: Two test cases are processed. For each, the brand and model are read from the first line of the case and the year from the second line, then the formatted sentence is printed.

sampleTestCases.output: You dream of owning a Ford Mustang in the year 2025.
sampleTestCases.explanation: A single test case with brand Ford, model Mustang, and year 2025 produces the corresponding output line.

sampleTestCases.output: You dream of owning a Honda Civic in the year 1900.
sampleTestCases.explanation: Edge case where the year is the minimum allowed value (1900). The program still formats the output correctly.

hidden.label: minimum boundary
hidden.expectedOutput: You dream of owning a A B in the year 1900.

hidden.label: maximum boundary
hidden.expectedOutput:
You dream of owning a XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX YYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYY in the year 2100.
You dream of owning a ZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZ ZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZ in the year 2099.

hidden.label: edge case
hidden.expectedOutput: You dream of owning a Ford F150 in the year 2000.

hidden.label: general case 1
hidden.input:
3
Toyota Corolla
2022
BMW X5
2025
Audi A4
2023
hidden.expectedOutput:
You dream of owning a Toyota Corolla in the year 2022.
You dream of owning a BMW X5 in the year 2025.
You dream of owning a Audi A4 in the year 2023.

hidden.label: general case 2
hidden.expectedOutput: You dream of owning a Tesla Model3 in the year 2035.

solution.approach: Read the integer T. Loop T times reading the brand and model as two separate tokens, then read the year as an integer. For each test case print the required sentence using the read values. No complex algorithm is needed; the task is pure input parsing and formatted output.
solution.timeComplexity: O(T) – each test case is processed in constant time.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) – only a few variables are stored regardless of T.

code.C:
#include <stdio.h>
int main(){int T; if(scanf("%d",&T)!=1) return 0; for(int i=0;i<T;++i){char brand[25],model[25];int year;scanf("%s %s",brand,model);scanf("%d",&year);printf("You dream of owning a %s %s in the year %d.\n",brand,model,year);}return 0;}
code.Python3:
import sys

def main():
    data=sys.stdin.read().strip().splitlines()
    if not data:
        return
    t=int(data[0])
    out=[]
    idx=1
    for _ in range(t):
        brand,model=data[idx].split()
        year=int(data[idx+1])
        out.append(f"You dream of owning a {brand} {model} in the year {year}.")
        idx+=2
    sys.stdout.write("\n".join(out))

if __name__=="__main__":
    main()
